case_title: JODIE COOMBS VS. CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO

docket_entries.description: REQUEST PENDING TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF COOMBS, JODIE
ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52 AS TO PLAINTIFF COOMBS, JODIE
ORDER CASE CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-08-2023 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO JUL-26-2023 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF JODIE COOMBS IS NOT PRESENT. APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO REPRESENTED BY NICHELLE FLENTROY, CLAIMS ADJUSTER WITH WITNESS JONATHAN VAING, DPW. ANDREW HOWARD INFORMED THE COURT THAT MS. COOMBS WAS UNALBE TO REACH THE COURT AND REQUESTS A CONTINUANCE DUE TO UNEXPECTED MEDICAL ISSUE. HONORABLE JUDGE PRO TEM MANI SHEIK ALLOW THE CONTINUANCE. JUDGE PRO TEM: MANI SHEIK; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)

DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) SACHIKO YOSHITSUGU, LEGAL INTERN, SAN FRANCISCO CITY ATTORNEY'S OFFICE. FILED BY DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$0) SERVED APR-19-2023, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO
ORDER TO CONTINUE PER REQUEST OF PLANTIFF. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-06-2023 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO JUN-08-2023 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF JODIE COOMBS IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO IS NOT PRESENT. NO PROOF OF SERVICE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: PANG LY; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED. (D506)

SMALL CLAIMS - CONTINUE ORDER (FOR JULY-26-2023 HEARING DATE) RETURNED. SENT TO: DEFENDANT - CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO. (ENVELOPE MARKED:RETURNED TO SENDER - INSUFFICIENT ADDRESS - UNABLE TO FORWARD)
ORDER CASE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF JODIE COOMBS IS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY SACHIKO YOSHITSUGU (LEGAL INTERN, SAN FRANCISCO ATTORNEY'S OFFICE). DEFENDANT SUBMITS DECLARATION OF FREDERICK SHEINFIELD IN SUPPORT OF AUTHORIZING SACHIKO YOSHITSUGU TO REPRESENT THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: WILLIAM LYNN; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
